strengths: 13+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded
Strong TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship background
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure appears dated
Cloud experience narrow (AWS CDK only); no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and thin modern cloud/k8s evidence

response.justification: Candidate clearly exceeds the 6+ years bar with deep full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, plus directly relevant current experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. Craftsmanship signals (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, workshops, OSS projects) align well with quality and code-review expectations. Gaps around Nest.js, modern cloud breadth, and recency of Kotlin/Java are real but learnable given the demonstrated polyglot track record.
